title: ChatMessageEntry and ChatMessagePush missing PartialEq derive
description: types.rs: ChatMessageEntry (line 1543) and ChatMessagePush (line 1577) derive Debug+Clone+Deserialize but not PartialEq. Every other significant push-payload type in the file has PartialEq. Without it, test assertions require field-by-field comparison and application logic that compares received payloads must do the same. Simple derive fix.
